MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
